quests.name: The Jailbreak
objectives: Talk to Lady inside the dog pound.
Find a tunnel to explore beyond your kennel.

Collect items from the other kennel.
  ‧ Find the Old Rope.
  ‧ Remove the Coat Hook from the wall with your Pickaxe.
  ‧ Collect the Coat Hook.
Craft the Old Rope and Coat Hook into a tool to retrieve the Kennel Key.
Use the Improvised Grappling Hook to grab the Kennel Key in the corner of the cell.
Pick up the Kennel Key.
Talk to Lady to complete your escape plans.
Use the Kennel Key in the kennel lock.
Follow Lady to the dog pound exit.
Talk to Lady.
Open the door to escape the dog pound.
Search for Tramp behind Tony's.
Where could Tramp be? Check with Lady.
Leave the Realm and check in with Merlin.
Talk to Merlin for ideas on how to solve your sticky spaghetti issues.

Collect the materials you need to craft a Substitute Snout.
  ‧ 6 Raspberry.
  ‧ 4 Blue Falling Penstemon.
  ‧ 4 Purple Falling Penstemon.
  ‧ 10 Soil.
  ‧ 1 Topaz.
Return to the Lady and the Tramp Realm to collect the final Ingredient for the Substitute Snout.
Talk to Lady about creating the Substitute Snout.
Collect 12 Saucery Extract to complete your Substitute Snout.
Craft the Substitute Snout.
Dress up with the Substitute Snout.
Talk to Lady about sniffing out Tramp.
Follow the scent trail to find Tramp.
Tramp's stuck! Talk to Lady to figure out what to do.
Use your Shovel to reach Tramp.

quests.name: Critters and Compassion
objectives: Talk to Lady. (Check the table behind Tony's Restaurant.)

Re-order the jumbled Memory in the Lady and the Tramp Realm.
  ‧ (Either interact with the Puzzle Orb or check the Collection menu.)
Talk to Lady about the fond memory.
Go back inside the dog pound.
Talk to Lady and work out an escape plan for the critters.
Take a picture of the lock.
Talk to Lady to show her the picture you took.
Leave the dog pound.
Talk to Lady about making a new key.

Find and collect 5 Giant Cheeses:
  ‧ Massive Mozzarella.
  ‧ Gorgeous Gorgonzola.
  ‧ Perfect Parmesan.
  ‧ Fabulous Fontina.
  ‧ Astounding Asiago.
Cook Magical Melted Cheese.
Check with Lady whether she found any extra crafting materials.
Craft the Cheese Key.
Return to the dog pound to free the critters.
Talk to Lady about the key.
Use the Cheese Key to open the critters' kennel door.
Talk to Lady about the critters.
Something is odd about the dog bed at the back of the kennel. Investigate it.
Talk to Lady about what you experienced.
Time to get out of here! Leave the dog pound.
Talk to Lady.

Use your Pickaxe to break through to the Realm Exit.
  ‧ (Use your Substitute Snout for a hint where to go.)
Meet up with Lady at the Realm Exit. (You may have to clear a path for both of you to get there.)
Talk to Lady.
Leave the Realm and return to Dreamlight Valley.
Talk to Lady to see if she remembers this place.
